jira.summary: Improve Login On Behalf UX for Support Member from Back Office

verdictReason: All P0/P1 cases for VCST-4905 are now Automated with end-to-end pass evidence on vcst-qa. AUTH-027, AUTH-069, AUTH-070, AUTH-072, AUTH-077 all PASS. Test data: SUPPORT_AGENT=John Mitchell (Customer-type with platform:security:loginOnBehalf + CanImpersonate); IMPERSONATE_TARGET=David Kim. Suite 031 validates 60/60 refs OK. Remaining items are quality polish (AUTH-075/076 manual-flag, AUTH-078 precondition rewrite, BL-AUTH-008 proposal, 403→/403 redirect bug worth filing).

verificationResults.note: V4 initially BLOCKED (wrong admin blade); V4b re-run at corrected path Security > Users → VERIFIED. Discovery: admin click opens form (cross-origin session), not silent flow. AUTH-027 rewritten from Silent Flow → Form Flow contract.

resolved.fix: RESOLVED 2026-05-11 — registered IMPERSONATE_TARGET → b2b/users.csv USR-003 Mike Torres (platform_id 94a4f116-5f10-4a55-9e01-f483b43120a2, AcmeCorp viewer). Validator: suite 031 = 37/37 OK.
RESOLVED 2026-05-11 — registered OTHER_ORG_USER → b2b/users.csv USR-007 David Kim (platform_id ec3031ac-6dd9-42e9-b7a7-0c10d9aac07b, TechFlow buyer in ORG-002).

shouldFix.issue: RESOLVED — admin button found at Security > Users (not Customer > Contacts). AUTH-027 rewritten to Form Flow contract (admin click → cross-origin storefront tab → Security Verification Form → support fills creds → impersonate). AUTH-077 unchanged (storefront-side silent flow with CanImpersonate is correct).
shouldFix.fix: Done in this session — AUTH-027 Steps/Assertions/Cleanup updated; References include revision note.

shouldFix.issue: Network-intercept steps cannot be automated via Playwright MCP browser_* tools
shouldFix.fix: Mark Automation_Status: Manual until browser_evaluate fetch-mock helper is published

shouldFix.issue: Precondition depends on prior-test state (operator context)
shouldFix.fix: Rewrite to establish operator context within case's own Setup steps

shouldFix.issue: No business-logic invariant codifies login-on-behalf entry UX contract
shouldFix.fix: Propose BL-AUTH-008 (silent vs form, mutually exclusive); manual addition to .claude/agents/knowledge/business-logic.md if accepted
